description_long: This object is a visually striking firearm with a sleek, elongated barrel and a robust frame, adorned with a vivid red and orange flame pattern along its sides. The barrel is cylindrical and features a prominent muzzle, while the slide and receiver are metallic with engraved details. The grip is dark, likely textured for secure handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement. The top of the firearm includes iron sights for aiming, and the overall build suggests a heavy, solid construction. The coloration and design elements give it a modern, customized appearance, possibly for display or high-visibility use. The object is compact and appears to be made primarily of metal, with some polymer or plastic components in the grip.
description: A metallic shotgun with a vivid red and orange flame pattern, featuring a long barrel, dark grip, and rounded trigger guard. The design is modern and visually distinctive.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, barrel opening, and a glimpse of the iron sights on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full flame pattern, slide details, and the shape of the grip and trigger guard.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the length of the barrel, the iron sights, and the symmetry of the firearm.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the flame pattern and structural details of the grip and receiver visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
